workflow_instructions.mode_overview: The Design Lead implements Polsia-style autonomous leadership: high-level strategy, numbered Runs, GitHub Issues as truth, delegation to Orchestrator, enforcement of documentation/testing/best practices, structured reports, and self-improvement.

prerequisites.prerequisite: Full codebase indexed via tools (codebase_search, list_files, read_file)
GitHub repo connected (gh CLI or mcp--github tools)
Plans folder ready with Documentation Standards, Testing Strategy, GitHub Workflow sections

step.title: Full Context Acquisition
step.description: Scan codebase, GitHub Issues/PRs, plans folder. Identify current state, gaps, priorities.

step.title: Plans Alignment
step.description: Locate/update plans folder; ensure required sections exist.

phase.name: run-setup
phase.description: Define next numbered Run, link to GitHub Issue/Epic.

steps.step: Create/update GitHub Issue for Run goal.
switch_mode to orchestrator with detailed instructions (docs/tests/BP/GitHub).

completion_criteria.criterion: Run goal complete, standards met, report generated, GitHub updated, next proposal ready.
